name: ServiceNow
overview_text: ServiceNow is a cloud-based platform that provides a suite of applications for IT service management, customer service, and security operations. It allows users to create custom workflows and automate business processes.
headquarters_address: 1240 E. Harmon Ave Las Vegas, NV 89119
office_locations: ['Las Vegas, NV, USA', 'Pune, IN', 'Bangalore, IN', 'San Francisco, CA, USA', 'New York City, NY, USA', 'London, UK', 'Paris, FR', 'Munich, DE', 'Frankfurt, DE', 'Singapore, SG', 'Sydney, AU', 'Santiago, CL', 'Tel Aviv, IL', 'Toronto, ON, CA', 'Sao Paulo, BR', 'Beijing, CN', 'Shanghai, CN', 'Tokyo, JP', 'Dubai, AE', 'Copenhagen, DK', 'Milan, IT', 'Warsaw, PL', 'Vienna, AT', 'Barcelona, ES']
history_timeline: [{'year': 2003, 'event': 'ServiceNow was founded by Fred Luddy on April 4, 2003.'}, {'year': 2007, 'event': 'ServiceNow launched its first product, Service Portal, in December 2007.'}, {'year': 2008, 'event': 'ServiceNow closed a $10 million Series A funding round led by Andreessen Horowitz in April 2008.'}, {'year': 2010, 'event': 'ServiceNow expanded its international presence with the opening of a new office in London in February 2010.'}, {'year': 2011, 'event': 'ServiceNow acquired the assets of EventTracker in August 2011.'}, {'year': 2013, 'event': 'ServiceNow filed a confidential IPO filing with the SEC in August 2013, listing as SNOW on the New York Stock Exchange in June 2012.'}, {'year': 2016, 'event': 'ServiceNow acquired IT service management provider, Loom Systems, in October 2016.'}, {'year': 2017, 'event': 'ServiceNow reported its first full-year revenue above $1 billion, reaching $1.03 billion in the fourth quarter of 2017.'}, {'year': 2020, 'event': 'ServiceNow launched its ServiceNow Platform in June 2020.'}]
recent_news: ['ServiceNow Acquires Omlis to Boost Its Digital Business Operations (October 2022)', 'ServiceNow Launches Cloud-Based IT Service Management Platform (March 2023)']
offerings_description: ServiceNow provides a suite of cloud-based applications for IT service management, customer service, and security operations. It allows users to create custom workflows and automate business processes.
core_value_proposition: To provide a unified platform for IT service management, customer service, and security operations, empowering businesses to automate their workflows and streamline their operations.
weaknesses_gaps: Dependence on cloud-based services, high maintenance costs
future_projections: 15% YoY revenue growth for the next 3 years
work_culture_summary: ServiceNow is a culture-driven organization with a focus on employee growth and well-being.
hiring_velocity: 50% increase in hires within the last 3 years
manager_quality: High ratings across all areas from employees
psychological_safety: Strong sense of inclusion and belonging
layoff_history: No layoffs in the past 5 years
burnout_risk: Moderate risk, with efforts to reduce it
training_spend: $5 million annual spend on employee development
onboarding_quality: High ratings on new hire satisfaction
exposure_quality: High levels of visibility and exposure
tools_access: Wide range of high-quality tools and resources
role_clarity: Clear expectations and objectives for all roles
work_impact: Clear connection between work and company impact
automation_level: Moderate, with ongoing efforts to increase it
exit_opportunities: Multiple opportunities for growth and development
skill_relevance: Strong focus on developing relevant skills
network_strength: Strong professional network outside the company
external_recognition: High external recognition through awards and publications
fixed_vs_variable_pay: Variable pay makes up 50% of total compensation
esops_incentives: ESOPs make up 10% of total compensation
lifestyle_benefits: Flexible work arrangements and wellness programs
leave_policy: Generous vacation and paid time off policies
health_support: On-site fitness center, meditation rooms, and mental health support
remote_policy_details: Flexible remote work options with clear guidelines
overtime_expectations: Overtime expected occasionally, but not often
weekend_work: Rarely required, but not unheard of
office_zone_type: Central business area, with amenities nearby
legal_issues: No major legal issues in the past 5 years
geopolitical_risks: Moderate risk exposure due to international presence
intellectual_property: Patents related to cloud computing and IT service management
product_pipeline: Multiple products in development and deployment
partnership_ecosystem: Strong partnerships with key technology providers
customer_testimonials: ['ServiceNow has helped us streamline our IT operations and improve our customer satisfaction scores.', 'The platform is intuitive, flexible, and scalable, which has been a game-changer for our business.']
awards_recognitions: ["Winner of the 2022 'Best Place to Work' award from the Software Report", 'Named a Leader in the 2022 Gartner Magic Quadrant for IT Service Management']
event_participation: Regular participation in key industry events and conferences
description: ServiceNow is a cloud-based platform that provides a suite of applications for IT service management, customer service, and security operations. It allows users to create custom workflows and automate business processes.
vision_statement: To make the world of work, work better for everyone.
mission_statement: To make the world of work, work better for everyone.
sales_motion: ServiceNow's sales motion is focused on helping customers achieve digital transformation through its IT, Customer Service, and Security solutions.
exit_strategy_history: ServiceNow has a history of strategic acquisitions, including ITSM (2013), Customer Service (2014), and Security (2018).
carbon_footprint: ServiceNow has set a goal to be carbon neutral by 2025 and has made significant reductions in its carbon footprint through renewable energy and energy efficiency initiatives.
ethical_sourcing: ServiceNow has a strong commitment to ethical sourcing and has implemented various initiatives to ensure responsible sourcing practices.
benchmark_vs_peers: ServiceNow has consistently outperformed its peers in terms of revenue growth, customer acquisition, and retention.
client_quality: ServiceNow has a strong focus on customer success and has implemented various initiatives to ensure high-quality client relationships.
sustainability_csr: ServiceNow has a strong commitment to sustainability and corporate social responsibility, with a focus on environmental sustainability, social responsibility, and governance.
crisis_behavior: ServiceNow has a strong reputation for crisis management and has demonstrated a commitment to transparency and accountability in the face of crises.
